<!--
Before opening a request:
• Check the existing issues and discussions — it may already be proposed or in progress.
• This tracker is for features scoped to GetXify's core: state management, routing, and dependency injection.
• For general usage questions, use GitHub Discussions.
-->

## Problem statement

<!-- Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. Be concrete.
     e.g. "When navigating away quickly, the controller is disposed before the animation finishes, which causes..." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the feature or API change you'd like. Include example code where helpful. -->

```dart
// example of the desired API or behavior
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workarounds or alternative approaches have you tried or thought about?
     Why aren't they sufficient? -->

## Impact

<!-- Who benefits from this and how?
     Does it affect existing GetX migrations? Does it introduce breaking changes? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to related issues, prior art in other packages, screenshots, etc. -->
